glosses.ja: 芸術家; アーティスト

sentences.target: Meine Schwester ist Künstlerin in Köln.

translations.de: Meine Schwester ist Künstlerin in Köln.
translations.en: My sister is an artist in Cologne.
translations.es: Mi hermana es artista en Colonia.
translations.fr: Ma sœur est artiste à Cologne.
translations.it: Mia sorella è un'artista a Colonia.
translations.zh-Hans: 我姐姐在科隆做艺术家。
translations.yue: 我家姐喺科隆做藝術家。
translations.pt: Minha irmã é artista em Colônia.
translations.vi: Chị tôi là nghệ sĩ ở Cologne.
translations.nl: Mijn zus is kunstenares in Keulen.
translations.hi: मेरी बहन कोलोन में कलाकार है।
translations.pl: Moja siostra jest artystką w Kolonii.
translations.el: Η αδελφή μου είναι καλλιτέχνιδα στην Κολωνία.
translations.nb: Søsteren min er kunstner i Köln.
translations.id: Kakak saya seorang seniman di Köln.
translations.sv: Min syster är konstnär i Köln.
translations.ro: Sora mea este artistă în Köln.
translations.cs: Moje sestra je umělkyně v Kolíně nad Rýnem.
translations.da: Min søster er kunstner i Köln.
translations.ja: 私の姉はケルンでアーティストです。

tokens.explanation: Attributive possessive determiner modifying 'Schwester'; agrees with feminine singular in nominative.
Head noun; feminine singular; subject of the copular clause.
Finite copula (3rd person singular, present) linking the subject to the predicate nominal.
Predicate noun (nominative) specifying the subject's profession.
Preposition expressing location; governs the dative case.
Proper noun (city name) serving as the object of 'in' (dative).

sentences.target: Die Künstlerin malt heute im Park.

translations.de: Die Künstlerin malt heute im Park.
translations.en: The artist is painting in the park today.
translations.es: La artista pinta hoy en el parque.
translations.fr: L'artiste peint aujourd'hui dans le parc.
translations.ko: 그 예술가는 오늘 공원에서 그림을 그리고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 这位艺术家今天在公园里画画。
translations.yue: 嗰位藝術家今日喺公園畫畫。
translations.pt: A artista está pintando no parque hoje.
translations.vi: Hôm nay người nghệ sĩ đang vẽ trong công viên.
translations.nl: De kunstenares schildert vandaag in het park.
translations.hu: A művésznő ma a parkban fest.
translations.hi: आज कलाकार पार्क में चित्र बना रही है।
translations.el: Η καλλιτέχνιδα σήμερα ζωγραφίζει στο πάρκο.
translations.nb: Kunstneren maler i parken i dag.
translations.id: Seniman itu sedang melukis di taman hari ini.
translations.sv: Konstnären målar i parken i dag.
translations.da: Kunstneren maler i parken i dag.
translations.ja: その芸術家は今日公園で絵を描いています。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; feminine singular nominative marking the subject.
Head noun; feminine singular; grammatical subject.
Main verb (3rd person singular, present) expressing the action.
Temporal adverb modifying the verb.
Contracted preposition ('in dem'); introduces a dative prepositional phrase.
Noun in dative as the object of 'im' (location).

sentences.target: Ich kenne eine Künstlerin aus der Nachbarschaft.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈkɛnə ˈaɪ̯nə ˈkʏnstləʁɪn aʊ̯s deːɐ̯ ˈnaxbaːʁʃaft/

translations.de: Ich kenne eine Künstlerin aus der Nachbarschaft.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈkɛnə ˈaɪ̯nə ˈkʏnstləʁɪn aʊ̯s deːɐ̯ ˈnaxbaːʁʃaft/
translations.en: I know an artist from the neighborhood.
translations.es: Conozco a una artista del barrio.
translations.fr: Je connais une artiste du quartier.
translations.zh-Hans: 我认识一位附近的艺术家。
translations.yue: 我識一位附近嘅藝術家。
translations.ru: Я знаю одну художницу из нашего района.
translations.pt: Eu conheço uma artista do bairro.
translations.vi: Tôi biết một nghệ sĩ ở khu phố.
translations.nl: Ik ken een kunstenares uit de buurt.
translations.uk: Я знаю одну художницю з нашого району.
translations.hi: मैं पड़ोस की एक कलाकार को जानता हूँ।
translations.el: Ξέρω μια καλλιτέχνιδα από τη γειτονιά.
translations.nb: Jeg kjenner en kunstner fra nabolaget.
translations.id: Saya kenal seorang seniman dari lingkungan sekitar.
translations.sv: Jag känner en konstnär från kvarteret.
translations.cs: Znám jednu umělkyni z naší čtvrti.
translations.da: Jeg kender en kunstner fra nabolaget.
translations.ja: 近所の芸術家を知っています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 1st person singular; subject.
Main verb (1st person singular, present).
Indefinite article; feminine singular accusative marking the direct object.
Direct object (accusative); feminine singular.
Preposition meaning 'from'; governs the dative.
Definite article; feminine singular dative within the prepositional phrase.
Noun in dative serving as the object of 'aus', indicating origin.

translations.en: My friend wants to become an artist.
translations.it: La mia amica vuole diventare artista.
translations.zh-Hans: 我的朋友想成为艺术家。
translations.vi: Bạn tôi muốn trở thành nghệ sĩ.
translations.hi: मेरी सहेली कलाकार बनना चाहती है।
translations.el: Η φίλη μου θέλει να γίνει καλλιτέχνιδα.
translations.ro: Prietena mea vrea să devină artistă.
translations.cs: Moje kamarádka se chce stát umělkyní.
translations.ja: 私の友達はアーティストになりたいです。

tokens.explanation: Attributive possessive determiner modifying 'Freundin'; feminine singular nominative.
Head noun; feminine singular; subject.
Finite modal auxiliary (3rd person singular, present) expressing volition.
Predicate noun within the infinitival complement, indicating the profession to become.
Infinitive verb functioning as the complement to the modal 'will' (to become).
